diff: To effect the Genesis Capitalization of Core Council Executor Agent 1, Sky Core shall directly transfer (1) 20,000,000 USDS to the Core Council Executor Agent 1 SubProxy and (2) 5,000,000 USDS to the Core Council Buffer (see [A.2.4.1.4.1.1.1 - Core Council Buffer](8b6781d7-f35c-4ffe-b8ed-299fa98e3da7)). The 5,000,000 USDS transfer constitutes part of Core Council Executor Agent 1's Genesis Capital Allocation, deposited directly to its operational payment account.
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes
